name: long query search shows full-text results and supports tag filtering

steps.name: Clear search button should be visible after entering long query getByTestId('search-panel-clear')
Full-text results should report two found notes before tag filtering getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByText(/^Found:\s+\d+\s+note/).first()
Search duration should be shown in milliseconds getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByText(/^\d+ms$/).first()
At least one highlighted fragment should be visible in full-text results getByTestId('search-results-panel').locator('mark').first()
Result card for "keep 1783002015719-1730d8" should be visible in full-text search getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'keep 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()
Result card for "drop 1783002015719-1730d8" should be visible in full-text search getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'drop 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()

Result card for "aa hidden 1783002015719-1730d8" should not be visible in full-text search getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'aa hidden 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()
Clear tags button should be visible after applying full-text tag filter getByTestId('search-panel-clear-tag')
Full-text results should report one note after tag filtering getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByText(/^Found:\s+\d+\s+note/).first()

Result card for "keep 1783002015719-1730d8" should remain after full-text tag filter getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'keep 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()

Result card for "drop 1783002015719-1730d8" should be excluded by full-text tag filter getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'drop 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()

Result card for "aa hidden 1783002015719-1730d8" should remain excluded in full-text + tag mode getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'aa hidden 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()
clear text query and keep tag scope
Search input should be empty after clearing long query getByTestId('search-panel-input').first()
Tag filter should remain active after clearing only long query text getByTestId('search-panel-clear-tag')
Clearing long query should keep tag-only search results in the panel getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByText(/^Found:\s+\d+\s+note/).first()
Tagged note "keep 1783002015719-1730d8" should remain visible in tag-only mode getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'keep 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()

Tagged note "aa hidden 1783002015719-1730d8" should be visible in tag-only mode getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'aa hidden 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()
Untagged note "drop 1783002015719-1730d8" should remain excluded in tag-only mode getByTestId('search-results-panel').getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'drop 1783002015719-1730d8' }).first()
open a note and verify its content
Reading view heading should be visible after opening full-text search result getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reading' })
Reading view should show body text from the opened full-text result note locator('.note-content')
